glosses.vi: cơ quan nhà nước; chức vụ

translations.en: I'm going to the government office soon.
translations.es: Voy al ayuntamiento en un rato.
translations.fr: Je vais bientôt à la mairie.
translations.yue: 我陣間會去政府辦事處。
translations.pt: Vou à repartição pública daqui a pouco.
translations.vi: Tôi sắp đến cơ quan nhà nước.
translations.nl: Ik ga zo naar het gemeentehuis.
translations.hi: मैं थोड़ी देर में सरकारी दफ्तर जा रहा हूँ।
translations.id: Sebentar lagi aku ke kantor pemerintah.
translations.ro: Mă duc în curând la primărie.

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun; subject of the clause.
Finite main verb (present); denotes movement; intransitive here.
Temporal adverb; modifies the verb to indicate immediacy.
Preposition (contraction of 'zu dem'); governs dative; marks destination.
Common noun; object of the preposition; governmental authority office (dative after 'zum').

sentences.target: Sie wartet seit Stunden beim Amt.

translations.de: Sie wartet seit Stunden beim Amt.
translations.en: She's been waiting for hours at the government office.
translations.es: Lleva horas esperando en el ayuntamiento.
translations.fr: Elle attend depuis des heures à la mairie.
translations.it: È da ore che aspetta in comune.
translations.ko: 그녀는 관공서에서 몇 시간째 기다리고 있다.
translations.zh-Hans: 她在政务大厅等了好几个小时。
translations.yue: 佢喺政府辦事處等咗幾個鐘。
translations.ru: Она ждёт в администрации уже несколько часов.
translations.pt: Ela está esperando há horas na repartição pública.
translations.vi: Cô ấy đã chờ hàng giờ ở cơ quan nhà nước.
translations.ar: هي تنتظر منذ ساعات في الدائرة الحكومية.
translations.nl: Ze wacht al uren bij het gemeentehuis.
translations.uk: Вона чекає в адміністрації вже кілька годин.
translations.hu: Már órák óta vár a hivatalban.
translations.hi: वह सरकारी दफ्तर में घंटों से इंतज़ार कर रही है।
translations.pl: Czeka w urzędzie już od kilku godzin.
translations.el: Περιμένει στο δημαρχείο εδώ και ώρες.
translations.nb: Hun har ventet i timevis på rådhuset.
translations.id: Dia sudah menunggu berjam-jam di kantor pemerintah.
translations.sv: Hon har väntat i timmar på stadshuset.
translations.ro: Ea așteaptă de ore întregi la primărie.
translations.da: Hun har ventet i timevis på rådhuset.
translations.ja: 彼女は役所で何時間も待っている。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun; clause subject; 3rd person singular feminine here (agrees with 'wartet').
Finite main verb; intransitive; expresses the act of waiting.
Preposition; governs dative; introduces a duration starting point or span.
Common noun; dative plural after 'seit'; temporal complement indicating duration.
Preposition (contraction of 'bei dem'); governs dative; marks location.
Common noun; object of the preposition; location of the waiting.

sentences.target: Mein Antrag liegt noch beim Amt.

translations.de: Mein Antrag liegt noch beim Amt.
translations.en: My application is still at the government office.
translations.es: Mi solicitud todavía está en el ayuntamiento.
translations.fr: Ma demande est encore à la mairie.
translations.it: La mia domanda è ancora in comune.
translations.zh-Hans: 我的申请还在政务大厅。
translations.yue: 我嘅申請仲喺政府辦事處。
translations.ru: Моё заявление всё ещё в администрации.
translations.pt: Minha solicitação ainda está na repartição pública.
translations.vi: Đơn của tôi vẫn còn ở cơ quan nhà nước.
translations.ar: طلبي ما زال في الدائرة الحكومية.
translations.nl: Mijn aanvraag ligt nog bij het gemeentehuis.
translations.hu: A kérelmem még mindig a hivatalban van.
translations.hi: मेरी अर्जी अभी भी सरकारी दफ्तर में है।
translations.pl: Mój wniosek wciąż jest w urzędzie.
translations.el: Η αίτησή μου είναι ακόμα στο δημαρχείο.
translations.nb: Søknaden min ligger fortsatt hos kommunen.
translations.id: Permohonan saya masih ada di kantor pemerintah.
translations.sv: Min ansökan ligger fortfarande hos kommunen.
translations.ro: Cererea mea este încă la primărie.
translations.cs: Moje žádost je stále na úřadě.
translations.da: Min ansøgning ligger stadig hos kommunen.
translations.ja: 私の申請はまだ役所にある。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner; modifies 'Antrag' to mark possession.
Common noun; grammatical subject of the clause.
Finite main verb; denotes state/location rather than motion.
Adverb; indicates continuation of a state ('still').
Preposition (contraction of 'bei dem'); governs dative; marks location.
Common noun; object of the preposition; place where the application is.

sentences.target: Er ruft morgen beim Amt an.

translations.de: Er ruft morgen beim Amt an.
translations.en: He will call the government office tomorrow.
translations.zh-Hans: 他明天会给政务大厅打电话。
translations.yue: 佢聽日會打去政府辦事處。
translations.pt: Amanhã ele vai ligar para a repartição pública.
translations.vi: Ngày mai anh ấy sẽ gọi đến cơ quan nhà nước.
translations.nl: Morgen belt hij naar het gemeentehuis.
translations.hi: वह कल सरकारी दफ्तर को फोन करेगा।
translations.nb: Han ringer til rådhuset i morgen.
translations.id: Besok dia akan menelepon kantor pemerintah.
translations.sv: Han ringer till stadshuset i morgon.
translations.da: Han ringer til rådhuset i morgen.
translations.ja: 彼は明日役所に電話する。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun; clause subject.
Finite main verb; part of the separable verb 'anrufen' ('to call').
Temporal adverb; indicates the time of the action.
Preposition (contraction of 'bei dem'); governs dative; marks location/recipient institution.
Common noun; object of the preposition; target institution of the call.
Separable verb particle that pairs with 'ruft' to form 'anrufen' ('to call').
